blocks.rationale: Comprehensive overview of strategic partnership discovery call with content creator Coral
Explicit commitments made by both parties regarding product trial, feedback, and university introductions
Decision to pilot Careerspan with Coral's community, decision to proceed with university partnership exploration
Critical stakeholder profiling: Coral (creator with 500 TikTok followers, FIU career advisor background), Ruth (university career director), Logan (co-founder)
Product trial, feedback collection, university introduction follow-up, promo code setup, community outreach planning
Follow-up conversations to schedule: Ruth at FIU, group chat with Logan, product feedback session
University market opportunity (FIU 50k students), creator distribution channel, Vmock replacement at scale, recruiting revenue model
Critical for follow-up workflow: premium trial code, promo codes for community, Zo platform introduction, university proposal materials
Multiple strategic insights: authenticity as moat, 30% white boy audacity required, women's under-advocacy problem, storytelling as core value
Classification, attendee metadata, system tracking, tags, categorization

selection_rationale: Strategic partnership discovery meeting with high business impact. Core blocks always generated (B01, B02, B26). Partnership_discovery meeting type triggers: B03_STAKEHOLDER_INTEL (external party), B03_DECISIONS (decisions made), B05_ACTION_ITEMS (multiple action items). Business context triggers B06 (university market) and B25 (deliverables critical for follow-up workflow). High-value conditionals: B08 (follow-ups), B21 (strategic quotes on authenticity/storytelling). Total 10 blocks provides comprehensive coverage for activation workflow.
